effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(h: E): produce A / {} := handle E with h in perform E.op
---
f : (E) -> produce A / {}
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(h: E, a: A): produce A / {} := handle E with h in produce a
---
f : (E, A) -> produce A / {}
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(): produce A / {} := perform E
---
ERROR: not handled in this context
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(h: thunk produce B): produce A / {} := handle E with h in produce a
---
ERROR: type mismatch
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := handle E with bundle { fn op() := produce a } in perform E.op
---
f : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
effect E1 { fn op1(): produce A }
effect E2 { fn op2(): produce B }
fn f(h1: E1, h2: E2): produce A / {} := handle E1 with h1 in handle E2 with h2 in perform E1.op1
---
f : (E1, E2) -> produce A / {}
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(h1: E, h2: E): produce A / {} := handle E with h1 in handle E with h2 in perform E.op
---
f : (E, E) -> produce A / {}
==========
effect Transform { fn apply(x: A): produce B }
fn f(a: A, b: B): produce B / {} := handle Transform with bundle { fn apply(x) := produce b } in perform Transform.apply(a)
---
f : (A, B) -> produce B / {}
==========
effect E { fn op1(): produce A; fn op2(x: A): produce B }
fn f(a: A, b: B): produce A / {} := handle E with bundle { fn op1() := produce a; fn op2(x) := produce b } in perform E.op1
---
f : (A, B) -> produce A / {}
==========
effect Bad { fn op(): A }
---
ERROR: operation return type must be a computation type
==========
effect E { fn op1(): produce A; fn op2(): produce B }
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := handle E with bundle { fn op1() := produce a } in perform E.op1
---
ERROR: missing operation
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := handle E with bundle { fn op() := produce a; fn bogus() := produce a } in perform E.op
---
ERROR: not an operation
==========
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := let x = a.field in produce x
---
ERROR: member access `.field` on type `A`
==========
effect E { fn op(): produce A }
fn f(h: E): produce A / {} := handle E with h in perform E.bogus
---
ERROR: no operation
